subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! Upon thee be the glory of God and His loving-kindness! We bear witness that from the beginning of the Cause thou didst turn thyself in devotion and didst arise to serve [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر علیک بهاء الله و عنایته شهادت میدهیم از اول امر اقبال نمودی و بخدمت
